title: Predicting a historic storm earlier with WeatherNext
summary: WeatherNext is Google DeepMind's global weather forecasting AI model that predicted the intensity and track of Hurricane Melissa in October 2025, providing advanced notice to meteorologists and authorities for evacuation warnings. The model successfully demonstrated high-confidence hurricane prediction capabilities days before landfall in Jamaica.
